Browse Portal → Random Article

About This Wiki

ArXiv Atlas is a knowledge portal for galaxy evolution research. Unlike traditional paper databases, we:

  • Connect concepts: Every paper links to relevant concepts, and concepts link to each other
  • Track claims: Papers are summarized with their key claims and evidence
  • Show disagreements: When papers contradict, we note it
  • Stay current: Daily updates from astro-ph.GA
